name: create-endpoint
description: Generate a dynamic CRUD endpoint definition with all 5 actions (list, get, create, update, delete)
prompt:
Define a complete set of dynamic CRUD endpoints for '{{serviceName}}' in the Postman collection and explain how to create them via the API.

Generate endpoint definitions for:
1. GET /{{resourcePath}} (list with pagination)
2. GET /{{resourcePath}}/{id} (get by ID)
3. POST /{{resourcePath}} (create)
4. PUT /{{resourcePath}}/{id} (update)
5. DELETE /{{resourcePath}}/{id} (delete)

Use backend_service: '{{serviceName}}-service' and appropriate backend_action values.
Include JSON schema for POST/PUT if needed.
Ensure the target table '{{tableName}}' has organization_id and app_id columns.

variables.name: resourcePath
variables.description: URL path for the resource (e.g., orders, products)
